info.description: CMDB (Configuration Management Database) - 模型配置与实例管理 API
info.title: CMDB API

post.description: Authenticate with username and password, returns a bearer token
Invalidate the current bearer token

get.description: Return the authenticated user's info

post.description: Register a new user account
Proxy chat completion request to an LLM API with SSE streaming. Records token usage.

parameters.description: Chat request (baseUrl, apiKey, model, messages, source)
parameters.name: body

get.description: List all chat histories for the current user

post.description: Create a new chat history

get.description: Get a single chat history by ID

put.description: Update a chat history's title and/or messages

delete.description: Delete a chat history by ID

get.description: Check if current user has a specific permission on a resource
Get paginated host list

post.description: Create a new host entry

get.description: Get host by ID
Get actual password and private key for a host (internal use only)
Get paginated inspection history records

post.description: Create a new inspection history record

parameters.description: Inspection record payload (host_id, host_name, host_ip, status, output, error, analysis, duration_ms)
parameters.name: body

get.description: List all Linxi chat sessions for the current user

post.description: Create a new Linxi chat session, optionally with initial messages

put.description: Update a Linxi chat session title

delete.description: Delete a Linxi chat session by ID

get.description: List all messages in a Linxi chat session

post.description: Add a message to a Linxi chat session

put.description: Update a message's content, thought, and/or status

get.description: Get all instances for a given model definition, with optional keyword search and pagination

200.description: Paginated response with items ([]ModelInstance), total, page, per_page, pages

post.description: Delete multiple model instances by IDs. Failed items are skipped, remaining items continue processing.

200.description: {\"code\":200,\"message\":\"批量删除完成，成功 N 条，失败 M 条\",\"success_count\":N,\"errors\":[...]}

get.description: Get all model definitions used for creating instances, with pagination

200.description: Paginated response with items ([]ModelSetting), total, page, per_page, pages

get.description: Get relation options (instances) for a given model definition

parameters.description: Field name to use as display label
parameters.name: display_field

get.description: Get a single model instance by ID

put.description: Update an existing model instance data

get.description: Get daily token usage breakdown for the last N days (default 7)

post.description: Record a single model usage entry (token consumption)

parameters.description: Usage payload (model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, source)
parameters.name: body

get.description: Get aggregated token usage stats per model
Get all model definitions for the current user, with pagination

200.description: Paginated response with items ([]ModelSetting), total, page, per_page, pages

post.description: Create a new model definition

parameters.description: Model definition payload (model_id, name, description, category, fields)
parameters.name: body

get.description: Get a single model definition by ID

parameters.description: Model Setting ID or Model ID
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: Updated model fields (model_id, name, description, category, fields)
parameters.name: body

delete.description: Delete a model definition and all its instances
